description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine writeseqversion_2, and is implemented by a call to writeseqversion_2. Use this API to replicate the working case in the form of a network sequence data file compatible with PSSE 27 or later. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.4. ierr = writeseqversion(vernum, out, ofile)

parameters.name: vernum
parameters.description: Value of ofile version number vernum =’27’ or later. example: if ofile format is to be psse 29.5.1: vernum=’29’ or =’29.5’ or =’29.5.1’. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ofile
parameters.description: Name of the network sequence data file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
